key_facts: Founded March 2023 in Beijing (Tongzhou district) as pure independent residential solar platform
Lead investor: Xinmingzhu Group (新名主集团)
Follow-on: Insurtech Long Green (绿长科技), Xuannis Industrial (宣尼实业)
Full-lifecycle residential rooftop PV: investment consulting, design, EPC, O&M, storage integration
Plans to expand into energy storage and wind post-solar market maturity
Management team cited: nationwide residential PV penetration only ~3.5% across 100M+ rooftop resources
Reported by 36Kr as first-disclosed angel round for a pure-play residential distributed solar platform in 2023 funding landscape

funding_history.notes: Xinmingzhu Group is a real estate / property developer entering solar — strategic rationale: developer owns rooftop access. '第一个纯住宅分布式太阳能平台' framing from 36Kr confirms market significance.

business_model_notes: Full-lifecycle residential rooftop service platform aiming to be the one-stop provider from initial consultation to O&M. Revenue: EPC installation margin + annual O&M subscription + storage integration upsell. The 3.5% penetration framing identifies the whitespace thesis: 100M+ rooftops barely tapped. Xinmingzhu Group (property developer) as lead investor provides strategic access to residential communities where solar installation rights negotiation is key barrier.
competitive_position: Very early stage (March 2023 founding, 36Kr 2023 coverage only). Positioned as VC-backed challenger to large-corp installers (Chint Anneng, Skyworth Solar). The CNY 100M angel round is meaningful for a March 2023 founding — indicates strong investor conviction in the whitespace thesis. Risk: competing against large-corp brands with established installer networks and supply chain advantages.
research_notes: Medium confidence. 36Kr article from 2023 confirmed the founding, investors, and thesis. Crunchbase pitchhub entry corroborates details. Status as of 2026 (3 years post-founding) unclear — limited subsequent press coverage found. The company may have successfully grown quietly or struggled with sales-cycle headwinds. The 3.5% penetration figure is a valuable market data point cited by the founding team.
